titleStmt.title: SII 37.245: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 245. (A.R. No. B 351 of 1940-41.) NemaŠł∑Šł∑adinne, JammalamaŠłćugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Vishnu temple.
This is dated Ňöaka 1480, KńĀŠł∑ayukti, Pushya Ňõu. 2, corresponding to 1558 A.D., December 11, Sunday.

It registers the remission made by MahńĀmaŠĻáŠłćalńďŇõvara RńĀmarńĀju TirumalarńĀjayyadńďva MahńĀrńĀju of the several taxes on the barbers of the village Nńďmalidinne situated in the Avukusńęma, similar to the remission made to the barbers in his realm by the king at the request of KoŠĻáŠłćŇćju.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 256.]

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti Ňõrńę jayńĀbhyudaya ŇõńĀlivńĀhana ŇõakavarŠĻ£aŠĻĀbulu
1480 AgunńďŠĻ≠i kńĀŠł∑ayukti saŠĻĀvatsara puŠĻ£ya Ňõu 2 lu . Ňõrńęma
nmahńĀrńĀjńĀdhirńĀjarńĀjaparamńďŇõvara Ňõrńę vńęrapratńĀpa ŇõrńęvńęrasadńĀ
ŇõivarńĀyadńďvamahńĀrńĀyalugńĀru vijayanagaramaŠĻĀdu va
jra ŇõiŠĻĀhvńĀsanńĀrŇęŠłćhulai pŠĻõdhivisńĀmrńĀjyaŠĻĀ ŇõńďyucuŠĻĀŠłćŠłćaŠĻĀgńĀnu
ŇõrńęmanmahńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćalńďŇõvara rńĀmarńĀja tirumalarńĀjayyadńďvama
hńĀrńĀjuluŠĻĀgńĀru Avuku ŇõńęmalŇćni namilidiŠĻĀnna maŠĻĀggaŠł∑a
vŇćjulaku Iccina dharmaŇõńĀsanakramameŠĻ≠laŠĻĀnnanu ŇõrńęsadńĀŇõi
vadńďvamahńĀrńĀyaluŠĻĀgńĀru vijayanagaramaŠĻĀddu maŠĻĀggaŠł∑a
koŠĻĀŠłćŇćjurńĀyasiŠĻĀhńĀsanńĀku cellńď Ňõńęmala nallńĀnu
maŠĻĀggaŠł∑lavŇćjarikńĀlu peŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńďpaŠĻĀnnu kńĀnike kaŠĻ≠naŠĻĀ AsaveccaŠĻĀ doŠĻĀmari
paŠĻĀnnu sidhńĀyaŠĻĀ veŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ivńďmulu sarvvamńĀnyńĀlugńĀnu dharmaŇõńĀsa
naŠĻĀ Iccina prakńĀrńĀna mńĀku cellńďnu Avuku ŇõńęmalŇćni namilidiŠĻĀnna maŠĻĀgga
Šł∑avŇćjulaku kńĀnikekaŠĻ≠naŠĻĀ veŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ivńďmulu doŠĻĀmaripaŠĻĀnnu siddhńĀyaŠĻĀ paŠĻĀ
nnu sa sarvvamńĀnyńĀlugńĀnu Istimi . ńÄcaŠĻĀdrńĀrkkastńĀyigńĀnu Isti
mi IŠĻĀduku yavaru tappikoŠĻĀnnńĀnu tallitaŠĻĀŠłćŠłćila vńĀraŠĻáńĀŇõini ku
ttikalu kŇćŇõina pńĀpńĀlapŇćduru . gaŠĻĀggńĀvatilŇćnu gaŠĻĀgegŇćvunu caŠĻĀ
ppina pńĀpńĀnapŇćduru . ŇõunakamńĀŠĻĀssaŠĻĀsuraŇõńďviŠĻĀccinapńĀ
pńĀna pŇćduru .
Digital edition of SII 37.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
